name: Chicken with Lemon Grass and Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. With a little oil, stir-fry the chilies until evenly cooked but not burnt. Set aside.
2. Fry the garlic with a little more oil until golden. Add the chicken, sugar, oyster sauce, and fish sauce. Cook until the chicken is browned. Lower the heat and add the liquid. Cook for a few more minutes.
3. When the chicken is completely cooked, add the nuts, lemon grass, and shallots carefully. Do not break the chilies.
